case_title: KOPPL, BETTY vs. HURLBURT, NICHOLAS et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HURLBURT, NICHOLAS BAUTISTA, YOUNGHAWK ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
O/C, SETTLED, STIPJ SUBMITTED BY PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HURLBURT, NICHOLAS BAUTISTA, YOUNGHAWK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1770 BROADWAY, #203, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. WILL WAIVE SUM OF $2634.99 TO REFLECT FULL FORGIVE- NESS OF ALL RENTS AND PER DIEM DAMAGES DUE ON PREMISES THROUGH 5/3/95; (SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS AT LENGTH).
